_note: Listings the user marked 'not interested'. bus_generate.py drops any current listing whose id OR normalized phone matches one of these before writing bus/data.json (and the registry). Survives across runs because it is committed. id forms produced by the engine: 'tel:<digits>' (preferred — collapses all reposts from one landlord) or 'url:<listing url>'. Add via scripts/ignore.py.
_modes_note: Two ignore modes per entry. HARD (no 'reconsiderAtPrice'): hide forever — the reason can't change (wrong bedroom count, low-info post, bad area). RECONSIDER ('reconsiderAtPrice': N): a 待考虑 set-aside keyed on (contact/url, price). Hidden ONLY while the listing's current price still equals N; any price change (up OR down) re-surfaces it, flagged 价格变动, to prompt a fresh look. Add with: python3 scripts/ignore.py <phone> --reconsider 2000
